backend/main.mo: Main actor for the B³ auction platform implementing auction management, team registration, player management, user profiles, access control, and blob storage using Motoko mixins and stable state.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that upgrades actor state by adding the `owner` field (defaulting to null) while preserving all existing auction, team, player, and access control state.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two implemented features related to the AdminLogin page: suppressing the admin-privileges error before login attempts and implementing a phase-based login/verify/redirect UI flow.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON file containing short summaries of key frontend source files including WatchPage, ResultsPage, AdminLogin, ProtectedRoute, and useQueries.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the UI.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app titled 'Bid Build and Battle (B³)' that mounts the app into a root div and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that defines the TanStack Router route tree with lazy-loaded pages for admin, team, watch, and results routes, with a default redirect to /watch.
frontend/src/components/AppFooter.tsx: Footer component displaying the app logo/name, a 'Built with caffeine.ai' attribution link, and a copyright notice.
frontend/src/components/AppHeader.tsx: Sticky navigation header with logo, desktop/mobile nav links that adapt based on admin/authenticated state, and login/logout buttons.
frontend/src/components/BidHighlight.tsx: Animation wrapper component that triggers a flash CSS animation on its children whenever the `trigger` prop value changes.
frontend/src/components/ConfirmModal.tsx: A reusable confirmation dialog component built on AlertDialog that supports default, destructive, and success variants with an optional loading spinner state.
frontend/src/components/LoadingScreen.ts: A full-screen loading indicator displaying an animated spinner and the app name 'B³' while content is being fetched.
frontend/src/components/PlayerCard.tsx: Displays a cricket player's photo, role badge, stats, base price, and current bid in a card layout with three size variants (sm/md/lg).
frontend/src/components/ProtectedRoute.t: A route guard component that redirects unauthenticated users or those lacking admin/approval status to the appropriate login page, showing a loading screen during checks.
frontend/src/components/SkeletonLoader.t: Renders configurable skeleton placeholder UI in multiple layout variants (card, table-row, list, player-card, text) to indicate loading states.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React Query hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context with login/logout functionality, delegation validation, and status tracking via a React context and AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for backend interactions including auth checks, auction state, player management, team operations, and user profile mutations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Poppins font, sets up Tailwind, defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for a dark navy/cyan/pink theme, and declares utility classes and keyframe animations for glows, bid flashes, and transitions.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Utility module exporting helper functions for class merging (cn), currency formatting, and mapping backend enums (PlayerRole, PlayerCategory, AuctionStatus, TeamStatus) to display labels and Tailwind color strings.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the root component wrapped with TanStack QueryClientProvider and a custom InternetIdentityProvider for ICP authentication.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard page with tabbed sections for auction setup, team approval/rejection, player management (add/delete), and auction state control (start/pause/complete), using React Query hooks and confirmation modals.
frontend/src/pages/AdminLogin.tsx: Admin login page that authenticates via Internet Identity, verifies the caller has admin privileges against the backend actor, and redirects to the admin dashboard or shows an error if unauthorized.
frontend/src/pages/ResultsPage.tsx: Results page displaying auction outcome statistics, team summaries, and player pool data with tabs, and providing CSV/JSON export functionality for teams and players.
frontend/src/pages/TeamDashboard.tsx: React page for authenticated team users to view the current auction player, track bid history, and place bids with a countdown timer and budget tracker.
frontend/src/pages/TeamLogin.tsx: Login page for team users using Internet Identity, handling approval status checks and redirecting to the dashboard or showing a pending-approval state with a request-approval action.
frontend/src/pages/TeamRegister.tsx: Registration page where new team owners authenticate via Internet Identity, fill in team details, and submit for admin approval before participating in auctions.
frontend/src/pages/WatchPage.tsx: Public read-only spectator page that displays the current auction player, live bid feed, countdown timer, and auction status without allowing bidding.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing helper functions to read, persist, and clear URL query parameters from both standard query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage fallback.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom colors (navy, cyan, pink using oklch), fonts (Poppins), shadows, border radii, and keyframe animations. Includes plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Tracks the current state of the 'Bid Build and Battle' project, documenting known issues (admin login broken), existing features, and pending action requests including rewriting admin login flow and replacing hardcoded principal whitelist with first-login-claims-admin backend logic.
